items.title: Billy Idol says smoking crack helped him quit heroin: 'It worked'

items.title: Russia blames Ukrainian naval drones as tanker sinks in Mediterranean
items.dek: The Arctic Metagaz went down between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan officials say.
items.body: The Arctic Metagaz went down between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan officials say.

items.title: Iran postpones Khamenei funeral as US-Israeli bombardment continues
items.dek: An official says more preparations are needed for the three-day ceremony in Tehran, where the supreme leader will lie in state.
items.body: An official says more preparations are needed for the three-day ceremony in Tehran, where the supreme leader will lie in state.
